ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the machine learning model used (e.g., neural network, decision tree) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the experiment */,
  "last_modified_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the experiment */,
  "experiment_group" TEXT /* Group or category of the experiment */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags to categorize and search experiments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "layers" (
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each layer */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment to which the layer belongs */,
  "layer_name" TEXT /* Name of the layer (e.g., fc, conv) */,
  "coverage" REAL /* Coverage of the layer */,
  "cumulative_entropy" REAL /* Cumulative entropy of the layer */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the layer */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the layer */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the layer */,
  "num_steps" INTEGER /* Number of training steps for the layer */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate used for training the layer */,
  "momentum" REAL /* Momentum used for training the layer */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the layer configuration */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the layer configuration */,
  "last_modified_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  "layer_type" TEXT /* Type of the layer (e.g., Dense, Conv2D, LSTM) */,
  "activation_function" TEXT /* Activation function used in the layer */,
  "dropout_rate" REAL /* Dropout rate for regularization */,
  "input_shape" TEXT /* Input shape of the layer */,
  "output_shape" TEXT /* Output shape of the layer */,
  "layer_order" INTEGER /* Order of the layer in the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_layers_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of hyperparameters */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment to which the hyperparameters belong */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate used in the training */,
  "momentum" REAL /* Momentum used in the training */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size used in the training */,
  "epochs" INTEGER /* Number of epochs for training */,
  "optimizer" TEXT /* Optimizer used in the training (e.g., SGD, Adam) */,
  "loss_function" TEXT /* Loss function used in the training (e.g., MSE, CrossEntropy) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the hyperparameter set */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the hyperparameter set */,
  "last_modified_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  "weight_decay" REAL /* Weight decay (L2 regularization) used in the training */,
  "learning_rate_decay" REAL /* Learning rate decay factor */,
  "early_stopping_patience" INTEGER /* Number of epochs with no improvement after which training will be stopped */,
  "early_stopping_min_delta" REAL /* Minimum change in the monitored quantity to qualify as an improvement */,
  "shuffle" INTEGER /* Whether to shuffle the data before each epoch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of performance metrics */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment to which the metrics belong */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "auc_roc" REAL /* Area Under the ROC Curve (AUC-ROC) of the model */,
  "log_loss" REAL /* Log loss of the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the performance metric set */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the performance metric set */,
  "last_modified_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  "confusion_matrix" TEXT /* Confusion matrix in a serialized format */,
  "roc_curve" TEXT /* ROC curve data in a serialized format */,
  "pr_curve" TEXT /* Precision-Recall curve data in a serialized format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team or department the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* User permissions (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session ID for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
